caption:
The AI gave you a 400-word essay. You needed a 2-sentence answer.

This is the #1 frustration I hear from people who use AI daily — and it's not the AI's fault. It's a calibration problem.

AI defaults to "thorough" because thorough feels safe. It doesn't know you're a bullet-point person who reads on your phone between meetings. It doesn't know you hate preamble. It doesn't know that when you ask a question, you want the answer FIRST and the reasoning only if you ask.

So you get paragraphs. Every time. And you either skim, or you stop asking.

The fix isn't prompting harder. It's teaching the AI how your brain receives information — once — so it stops guessing.

Some people need the full context to trust an answer. Some people need the headline and nothing else. Neither is wrong. But getting the opposite of what you need, every single session, is a slow drain on your time and patience.

BootFile figures out your response style and builds it into your AI profile permanently. No more re-explaining. No more "shorter please." Just answers that actually land.

What's your AI pet peeve — too long, too vague, or something else? Drop it below 👇
